description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light gray and dark panels, with large windows arranged asymmetrically across the facade. There are visible rooftop HVAC units and a small green area, possibly a terrace or garden, on one side. The house includes multiple balconies and recessed sections, giving it a layered, contemporary appearance. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, typical of urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of gray and dark exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, dark and light paneling, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop units, and a small green terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional windows, balconies, and visible rooftop features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended structure, more windows, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, minimal steps, and no prominent decorative elements.
